auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Encodian API key sent with the X-ApiKey header. Generate or manage keys from the Encodian API key portal: https://www.encodian.com/apikey/.

extraFields.label: Regional API Host
extraFields.description: Optional Encodian regional API host. Leave empty to use the default host at https://api.apps-encodian.com.

actions.name: compress_pdf
actions.description: Compress one PDF document with Encodian and return the optimized PDF file as base64 content.

fileContent.description: The base64-encoded PDF document content to process.

compressImages.description: Whether Encodian should compress images embedded in the PDF document.

imageQuality.description: The image quality percentage used when image compression is enabled.

maxResolution.description: The maximum image resolution in DPI before Encodian scales oversized images down.

resizeImages.description: Whether Encodian should resize images larger than the maximum resolution.

removePrivateInfo.description: Whether Encodian should remove private PDF metadata from the document.

removeUnusedObjects.description: Whether Encodian should remove unused PDF objects from the document.

removeUnusedStreams.description: Whether Encodian should remove unused PDF resource streams.

linkDuplicateStreams.description: Whether Encodian should deduplicate identical PDF resource streams.

allowReusePageContent.description: Whether Encodian should reuse identical page content while optimizing pages.

unembedFonts.description: Whether Encodian should remove embedded fonts from the document.

flattenAnnotations.description: Whether Encodian should flatten annotations into the PDF content.

deleteAnnotations.description: Whether Encodian should delete annotations from the PDF document.

flattenFields.description: Whether Encodian should flatten AcroForm fields into the PDF content.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for compressing one PDF document.

anyOf.description: The output PDF file name returned by Encodian when available.

fileContent.description: The processed PDF document content returned by Encodian as a base64 string.

anyOf.description: The Encodian operation identifier returned for this request when available.
The Encodian operation status returned for this request when available.

items.description: One Encodian error message returned alongside the response.

errors.description: Any Encodian error messages echoed with the response.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Encodian file result with base64 output content.

actions.name: extract_pdf_pages
actions.description: Extract selected pages from one PDF document and return the resulting PDF file as base64 content.

fileContent.description: The base64-encoded PDF document content to process.

startPage.description: The first one-based page number to extract.

endPage.description: The last one-based page number to extract. Leave empty to continue to the final page.

pageNumbers.description: A comma-separated list of one-based page numbers to extract, such as '1,3,4'.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for extracting selected pages from one PDF document.

anyOf.description: The output PDF file name returned by Encodian when available.

fileContent.description: The processed PDF document content returned by Encodian as a base64 string.

anyOf.description: The Encodian operation identifier returned for this request when available.
The Encodian operation status returned for this request when available.

items.description: One Encodian error message returned alongside the response.

errors.description: Any Encodian error messages echoed with the response.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Encodian file result with base64 output content.

actions.name: get_pdf_text_layer
actions.description: Extract the text layer from one PDF document with optional page-range and encoding controls.

fileName.description: The source PDF file name, including the .pdf extension required by Encodian.

fileContent.description: The base64-encoded PDF document content to process.

startPage.description: The first one-based page number to include when extracting the text layer.

endPage.description: The last one-based page number to include when extracting the text layer.

textEncodingType.description: The text encoding Encodian should use for the extracted PDF text layer.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for extracting the text layer from one PDF document.

textLayer.description: The PDF text layer extracted by Encodian.

anyOf.description: The PDF file name echoed by Encodian when available.
The Encodian operation identifier returned for this request when available.
The Encodian operation status returned for this request when available.

items.description: One Encodian error message returned alongside the response.

errors.description: Any Encodian error messages echoed with the response.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Encodian PDF text-layer extraction result.

actions.name: secure_pdf_document
actions.description: Encrypt one PDF document with optional open and edit passwords, then return the protected PDF as base64 content.

fileName.description: The source PDF file name, including the .pdf extension required by Encodian.

fileContent.description: The base64-encoded PDF document content to process.

userPassword.description: Optional password required to open the protected PDF document.

adminPassword.description: Optional password required to edit the protected PDF document.

pdfPrivileges.description: The Encodian privilege mode applied to the protected PDF document.

cryptoAlgorithm.description: The cryptographic algorithm Encodian should use for PDF encryption.

pdfPrivilegesAllowAssembly.description: Whether document assembly should be permitted when privileges are Specific.

pdfPrivilegesAllowCopy.description: Whether content copying should be permitted when privileges are Specific.

pdfPrivilegesAllowFillIn.description: Whether form filling should be permitted when privileges are Specific.

pdfPrivilegesAllowPrint.description: Whether printing should be permitted when privileges are Specific.

pdfPrivilegesAllowScreenReaders.description: Whether screen-reader extraction should be permitted when privileges are Specific.

pdfPrivilegesAllowModifyContents.description: Whether content modification should be permitted when privileges are Specific.

pdfPrivilegesAllowModifyAnnotations.description: Whether annotation modification should be permitted when privileges are Specific.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for securing one PDF document with passwords and privileges.

anyOf.description: The output PDF file name returned by Encodian when available.

fileContent.description: The processed PDF document content returned by Encodian as a base64 string.

anyOf.description: The Encodian operation identifier returned for this request when available.
The Encodian operation status returned for this request when available.

items.description: One Encodian error message returned alongside the response.

errors.description: Any Encodian error messages echoed with the response.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Encodian file result with base64 output content.

actions.name: unlock_pdf_document
actions.description: Remove password protection from one PDF document and return the unlocked PDF as base64 content.

fileName.description: The source PDF file name, including the .pdf extension required by Encodian.

fileContent.description: The base64-encoded PDF document content to process.

password.description: The password Encodian should use to unlock the PDF document.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for unlocking one password-protected PDF document.

anyOf.description: The output PDF file name returned by Encodian when available.

fileContent.description: The processed PDF document content returned by Encodian as a base64 string.

anyOf.description: The Encodian operation identifier returned for this request when available.
The Encodian operation status returned for this request when available.

items.description: One Encodian error message returned alongside the response.

errors.description: Any Encodian error messages echoed with the response.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Encodian file result with base64 output content.
